name: Givinostat
description: Givinostat has been used in trials studying the treatment of Polycythemia Vera, Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis, Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD), Chronic Myeloproliferative Neoplasms, and Polyarticular Course Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Givinostat.
